top_stories.title: Pinoys overestimate their digital hygiene – survey
top_stories.summary: Are Filipinos overconfident about their digital hygiene? Despite an overwhelming majority of Filipinos rating their online habits as good, fewer than half actually practice measures to protect themselves against cybercrime, according to a survey commissioned by insurance technology firm bolttech.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This surfaced because it appears to have meaningful ecosystem impact and is stronger than the average item in the daily radar.

top_stories.title: MGen completes restoration of Panay coal plant unit
top_stories.summary: The Meralco PowerGen Corp. (MGen) said that its subsidiary, the Panay Energy Development Corp. (PEDC), has successfully synchronized unit 3 of its 278.4-megawatt (MW) coal-fired power plant in Iloilo City back to the grid. This milestone, in effect, restored an important source of reliable power for Panay Island and...
